docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF PENNSYLVANIA AS TO DEFENDANT SCHWENK, STEVEN
